archetypes.name: Architect
archetypes.description: Designs high-impact structures and long-lived foundations.

archetypes.name: Maintainer
archetypes.description: Keeps projects healthy through steady, frequent improvements.

archetypes.name: Sprinter
archetypes.description: Ships in intense intervals with high momentum bursts.

archetypes.name: Stabilizer
archetypes.description: Prioritizes reliability, consistency, and low-volatility delivery.

archetypes.name: Polyglot
archetypes.description: Moves fluidly across ecosystems and language paradigms.

archetypes.name: Refactorer
archetypes.description: Improves structure and clarity while preserving behavior.

archetypes.name: Explorer
archetypes.description: Experiments, prototypes, and maps new technical territory.

archetypes.name: Integrator
archetypes.description: Connects systems, tools, and collaborators into cohesive workflows.

archetypes.name: Toolsmith
archetypes.description: Builds utilities that amplify team and ecosystem productivity.

archetypes.name: Finisher
archetypes.description: Pushes work across the line and delivers complete outcomes.
